status_meanings.not_started: No usable records are present yet.
status_meanings.in_progress: Collection or preparation work has started but is not ready for normal use.
status_meanings.collected: Records exist, but indexing or structured support is still incomplete.
status_meanings.structured: Records and indexes exist, but source-quality scoring is not complete.
status_meanings.validated: Local checks are passing, but external reliance is not yet approved.
status_meanings.needs_review: Known gaps, freshness checks, repair work, or human review remain open.
status_meanings.trusted: Local checks, freshness review, source support, and human review are complete.

agent_guidance: Read this file before relying on a layer. A layer marked needs_review can still be useful for local exploration, but user-facing answers should mention the open quality limits when those limits affect the answer.
boundary: This is a quality visibility file. It summarizes readiness signals; it does not certify legal correctness or replace official source review.
